cards.title: Efficient Virtual Consultations

features.title: AI-Enhanced Health Analytics

features.title: Smart AI Health Chatbot
features.text: Get instant, reliable answers to health questions anytime. Our AI chatbot offers quick symptom checks, guidance, and wellness tips.

features.title: Predictive Health Monitoring
features.text: Detect potential health risks before they escalate with AI-powered monitoring. Our technology analyzes data for early intervention. Stay ahead, stay healthy.
